name: XM1014 | 西装革履
descriptionEn: The XM1014 is a powerful fully automatic shotgun that justifies its heftier price tag with the ability to paint a room with lead fast. A vision in black and white chrome, this shotgun is best used on formal occasions. We have Izaki and Cocinero. You need them for anything or can I just kill them now? - The Mercenary and The Serpent Part 1
descriptionZh: XM1014 是一把强大的全自动霰弹枪，其高昂的价格赋予了它高射速和室内清剿的能力。 这把黑白镀铬的霰弹枪是正式场合的不二之选。 伊崎小太郎与库西内罗在我们手上。你是要留他们一个活口呢，还是我现在就把他们毙了？ - 雇佣兵与巨蟒，第 1 部
